verdict_rule: PASS only if every required check passes; never green-as-success over a failed check.

checks.pass_when: Dry-run is the default whenever a write is possible; --force requires a prior dry-run.
Repo root resolved via git rev-parse --show-toplevel; no absolute machine paths.
Every path/glob the script can touch is declared and bounded; broad write flagged.
No rm -rf, git reset --hard, or force push without explicit approval AND path isolation.
No env var, token, or credential is read, printed, or persisted.
Tempdirs use mktemp -d with a trap-clean; no static /tmp names.
Validation runs offline; no network call decides local safety.
Every expansion is quoted; Bashisms justified inline; stdlib/portable preferred.
Failure modes and rollback/fallback are documented.
Every non-obvious claim carries one Alfa-core tag with consistent spelling.
